summary: Schedule 1A has been patched for the previous NO-GO findings. The plan now tightens the staging reset blast radius, file-backed SQLite concurrency proof, mechanical direct-writer and lock guards, protocol/fork prerequisites, final verification gates, schema-validation wording, audit_access_log privacy gate, and SQLite-vs-PostgreSQL proof boundary. This sidecar does not re-approve the plan; it records that fixes were applied and that a fresh plan review is required before execution.

resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 18 now lists session rows and encrypted user_secrets in the destructive scope, requires operator signoff or secret re-entry/reseed planning, verifies secret-dependent composer outcomes after reset, and notes rollback restores secrets with the archived DB.
Task 8 now requires a bounded concurrent file-backed SQLite test using independent connections; StaticPool coverage is explicitly fixture/reentrancy coverage only.

The direct-write inventory gate now specifies an AST/token scanner, semantic-site allowlist entries, self-pattern exclusion, raw SQL/canary classification, and failure on new sites inside already-allowed files.
Task 14 now preserves fast targeted checks but adds a merge gate for tests/unit/web/ plus tests/integration/web/ and ruff over every changed Python file.

Tasks 7, 8, and 10 now require a ContextVar-backed _session_write_lock token/assertion and public-writer/static proof that save_composition_state and set_active_state enter the lock before version allocation.

patched_warnings.change: Direct-write inventory now calls out raw corruption fixtures and OperationalError SQL canaries for explicit classification.
Task 14 now includes tests/unit/web/sessions/test_protocol.py in the file list, sweep, ruff command, and atomic staging list.
Task 1 fixture prose now states the parent conftest is a shared helper source for new/updated tests and does not override local engine fixtures.
Section 14.6 now makes protocol/dataclass/get_messages hydration an explicit prerequisite before the fork copy sweep uses tool_call_id and parent_assistant_id.
Task 18 path resolution now normalizes relative DB paths under PROJECT_ROOT and canonicalizes DB_PATH before containment checks.
Task 18 now says the schema validator is not a migration or stale-DB compatibility proof and that archive/delete/recreate is the only accepted cutover path.
Schedule 1A Done When now states 1A proves SQLite-current deployability only and that full PostgreSQL DDL/concurrency proof belongs to Schedule 1C.
Task 4 now adds a future-writer privacy gate for query-arg allowlisting, headers/body/secrets/token exclusion, and explicit IP retention policy.
Task 1 now adds a post-metadata constraint-isolation gate so missing-column failures do not count as proof of CHECK/FK/unique behaviour.

verification: Patched the Schedule 1A markdown plan in place.
Review sidecar rewritten to record remediation instead of approval.
No implementation tests were run because this change only updates planning/review artifacts.
required_next_steps: Run a fresh plan review of Schedule 1A before execution.
Only replace REVIEW_REQUIRED with GO if that follow-up review validates the patched plan against the live tree.
Review Schedules 1B and 1C separately after 1A reaches GO.
residual_risks: The sibling 1B and 1C plans remain outside this remediation pass.
The direct-writer static guard allowlist must still be generated from the implementation branch that executes 1A.
The plan text was patched, but no code or runbook implementation has been executed yet.
